title: ServiceClass
description: A classification of the level of service offered by a transport service, such as economy, business, or first class.

serviceClassCode.description: Code identifying the service class (e.g. ECONOMY, BUSINESS, FIRST)

features.description: List of features and amenities included in this service class

id.description: Unique identifier for the category code

parentCategoryId.description: Identifier of the parent category if hierarchical
